description:
Phase 3 of fz-ul4.23. Real feedback loop for codegen iteration.

## Surface

- `fz dump <file.fz> [--fn name] [--emit clif|asm|both]`
- `fz run <file.fz> --emit clif|asm` — run AND dump

## Behavior

- `--emit clif`: Cranelift's Function::display() output, one fn per section. Each instruction prefixed with `; @file:line:col` derived from SourceLoc, resolved through diag::SourceMap.
- `--emit asm`: post-regalloc machine code via set_disasm(true) + capstone, same source-loc interleaving where Cranelift attaches locs.
- `--emit both`: CLIF block followed by asm block per fn.
- `--fn name` filters to one fn.

## Implementation notes

- Spans are already threaded through ir_codegen.rs (fz-ul4.21). Emission needs to call `func.set_srcloc(...)` with the span's offset; we can pack file_id+offset into a u32 SourceLoc and reverse it in the dumper.
- Capstone is already a transitive dep of cranelift_codegen with `disas` feature; verify.

## Out of scope

- Golden-file CLIF/asm checks (too brittle; see epic non-goals).
- IR text emit (`--emit ir`) — cheap follow-up if useful.

## Acceptance

- `fz dump --emit clif fixtures/add1.fz` prints source-annotated CLIF for every fn.
- `fz dump --emit asm fixtures/add1.fz` prints disassembled machine code with source locs.
- `fz run --emit clif fixtures/concurrency_ping_pong.fz` dumps CLIF then runs to completion.
title: fz dump --emit clif|asm with source annotations
